steps.name: Project setup
steps.criteria: go.mod initialised with all required dependencies and directory structure matches component-boundaries.md; config package reads HOST_TOKEN and QUIZ_DIR from environment and exits with error on missing values; server binary compiles cleanly; walking skeleton test fails for a business reason not a build error
steps.scenario_name: Marcus runs one complete round of trivia from YAML load to final scores

steps.name: Domain core
steps.criteria: game package defines QuestionFull, QuestionPublic, QuizFull, Team, Round, and GameState types; state machine enforces valid transitions and rejects invalid ones; StripAnswers in boundary.go converts QuestionFull to QuestionPublic with no answer field; zero imports from handler, hub, or quiz packages inside game package
steps.scenario_name: Marcus runs one complete round of trivia from YAML load to final scores

steps.name: YAML loader and quiz validation
steps.criteria: loader reads a YAML file from QUIZ_DIR and unmarshals it into QuizFull; validator rejects files with missing required fields and returns an error identifying round and question number; validator rejects files referencing absent media files; valid file produces a fully populated QuizFull
steps.scenario_name: Marcus runs one complete round of trivia from YAML load to final scores

steps.name: WebSocket hub and client connection management
steps.criteria: hub manages three named rooms: host, play, and display; clients register and deregister without data races under concurrent load; hub broadcasts events to all members of the target room; nhooyr.io/websocket v1.x used for all connections
steps.scenario_name: Marcus runs one complete round of trivia from YAML load to final scores

steps.name: Host handlers and auth guard
steps.criteria: auth guard validates ?token query parameter against HOST_TOKEN and returns 403 on mismatch; host WebSocket handler accepts connections only after auth guard passes; host.go handles host_load_quiz by invoking the quiz loader and creating a game session; handler package never imports QuestionFull or QuizFull
steps.scenario_name: Marcus runs one complete round of trivia from YAML load to final scores

steps.name: Play and display handlers -- walking skeleton passes
steps.criteria: play.go handles team_register, draft_answer, and submit_answers events; display.go handles display room connections and receives broadcast events; walking skeleton scenario passes end-to-end covering quiz load, registration, start, reveal, submission, scoring, ceremony, and game end
steps.scenario_name: Marcus runs one complete round of trivia from YAML load to final scores

steps.name: YAML load, game session creation, lobby display
steps.criteria: loading a valid YAML via host_load_quiz creates a session with a unique identifier; host receives confirmation in format 'Title | N rounds | M questions'; host panel shows a shareable player join URL and a shareable display screen URL
steps.scenario_name: Valid YAML file creates a game session

steps.name: Team registration and uniqueness enforcement
steps.criteria: team_register with a new name is accepted and a persistence token is returned to the player; the team appears in the host lobby list within 2 seconds; registering a name already taken (case-insensitive) returns 'That name is taken -- try a different team name' with no duplicate entry
steps.scenario_name: Player registers a new team name successfully

steps.name: Game start broadcast and late-joiner snapshot
steps.criteria: host_start_round broadcasts round-started to all play and display connections within 1 second; each player screen transitions from lobby to round view; a player connecting after game start receives a state snapshot and does not see the lobby screen
steps.scenario_name: Starting the game transitions all connected players simultaneously

steps.name: Question reveal and answer entry
steps.criteria: host_reveal_question broadcasts QuestionPublic with no answer field to play and display rooms; player screens accumulate all revealed questions while display shows only the latest; draft_answer persists the player's current text without locking; quizmaster panel shows 'N of M revealed'
steps.scenario_name: Revealing question 1 sends it to all player screens

steps.name: Answer submission with server ack and idempotency
steps.criteria: submit_answers locks the team's answers and server sends submission_ack to the submitting player; player screen enters read-only locked state only after ack is received; resubmitting resends the ack without modifying stored answers; quizmaster panel shows the team as submitted
steps.scenario_name: Player confirms submission through the confirmation step

steps.name: Scoring, ceremony, round scores, and game over
steps.criteria: host_mark_answer updates the verdict and recomputes running totals with no answer content sent to play or display rooms; host_ceremony_reveal_answer sends the answer to display room only; host_publish_scores broadcasts ranked round scores to all rooms; host_end_game broadcasts final standings and permanently locks player answer fields
steps.scenario_name: Quizmaster marks an answer correct and the score increments

steps.name: Reconnection, session rejoin, and state enforcement
steps.criteria: disconnected player reconnects using exponential backoff: 1s base, 2x multiplier, 30s max, 10 attempts; server sends state snapshot on reconnect so player sees current state with drafts intact; after 10 failed attempts the client stops retrying and shows a manual reconnect option; state machine rejects out-of-order host events without modifying game state
steps.scenario_name: Player reconnects after a brief connection loss and sees current state

steps.name: TypeScript/React frontend -- Host, Play, Display routes
steps.criteria: React SPA served from root path with HTTP 200 via go:embed; Host, Play, and Display routes communicate over WebSocket with their respective rooms; WebSocket client implements exponential backoff reconnection; TypeScript strict mode reports zero type errors
steps.scenario_name: React application served from root path
